Operation 'getPiaAircraft' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_context, missing_output_details. The description lacks clarity about what PIA aircraft are and why they're significant. Added context about privacy protection, what the endpoint returns, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

data.current_description: Returns aircraft using FAA Privacy ICAO Address program.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aircraft participating in the FAA Privacy ICAO Address (PIA) program. These aircraft have obscured ICAO addresses for privacy protection. Returns a collection of aircraft records with condensed field names in the standard response format. Useful for tracking privacy-protected aircraft in the ADS-B network.
data.reasoning: The description lacks clarity about what PIA aircraft are and why they're significant. Added context about privacy protection, what the endpoint returns, and use cases to help AI agents understand when to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getAircraftByLocationV2' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original description is too vague about parameters and return format. Added clarity about what parameters are required (lat, lon, dist), what format is returned (V2 condensed fields), and practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: V2 endpoint returning aircraft within the specified distance.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aircraft within a specified distance from a geographic location using the V2 API format. Accepts latitude, longitude, and distance parameters. Returns aircraft records with condensed V2 field names. Useful for geospatial queries to find all aircraft in a defined radius around a point.
data.reasoning: Original description is too vague about parameters and return format. Added clarity about what parameters are required (lat, lon, dist), what format is returned (V2 condensed fields), and practical use cases for AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getAircraftByIcaoV2' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Both summary and description are repetitive and lack actionable detail. Added domain context about ICAO addresses, clarified what the operation retrieves, and specified the V2 response format to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a specific aircraft by its ICAO address using the V2 API format. The ICAO address is a unique 24-bit identifier assigned to each aircraft. Returns aircraft record with condensed V2 field names including position, altitude, speed, and other real-time tracking data.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are repetitive and lack actionable detail. Added domain context about ICAO addresses, clarified what the operation retrieves, and specified the V2 response format to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getAircraftByCallsignV2' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_output_details, not_actionable. Both summary and description are repetitive and lack specificity. Added domain context about what callsigns represent, clarified the V2 response format, and noted that multiple results are possible to help AI agents understand the operation's behavior.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aircraft by their flight callsign using the V2 API format. The callsign is the identifier assigned to a specific flight operation (e.g., airline flight number). Returns aircraft record with condensed V2 field names including position, altitude, speed, and other real-time tracking data. May return multiple aircraft if callsigns are reused.
data.reasoning: Both summary and description are repetitive and lack specificity. Added domain context about what callsigns represent, clarified the V2 response format, and noted that multiple results are possible to help AI agents understand the operation's behavior.

message: Operation 'getMilitaryAircraftV2' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too minimal and lacks context about what constitutes 'military aircraft' and what data is returned. Added clarity about the V2 format, the collection nature of results, and what tracking data is included to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all military aircraft currently tracked in the ADS-B network using the V2 API format. Returns a collection of aircraft records with condensed V2 field names. Military aircraft are identified through various data sources and filtering mechanisms. Results include position, altitude, speed, and other real-time tracking data for military operations.
data.reasoning: Description is too minimal and lacks context about what constitutes 'military aircraft' and what data is returned. Added clarity about the V2 format, the collection nature of results, and what tracking data is included to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

message: Operation 'getAircraftByLocation' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Description lacks clarity on input parameter units/formats and what specific aircraft data fields are returned. Enhanced description specifies parameter expectations and return data types for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns all aircraft within the specified radius of the given latitude/longitude coordinates.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all aircraft currently tracked within a specified radius of given latitude/longitude coordinates. Accepts latitude, longitude, and distance parameters. Returns a collection of aircraft objects with real-time position data, altitude, speed, and identification information for all aircraft within the search radius.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on input parameter units/formats and what specific aircraft data fields are returned. Enhanced description specifies parameter expectations and return data types for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getAircraftByCallsign' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description is too generic and doesn't clarify that callsigns can match multiple aircraft or what specific data fields are returned. Enhanced description provides context about potential multiple matches and specifies return data structure for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Returns data for aircraft matching a specific callsign.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aircraft data for all aircraft matching a specific flight callsign. Callsigns may match multiple aircraft if the same callsign is used by different flights. Returns aircraft objects containing current position, altitude, speed, and identification data for all matching aircraft.
data.reasoning: Description is too generic and doesn't clarify that callsigns can match multiple aircraft or what specific data fields are returned. Enhanced description provides context about potential multiple matches and specifies return data structure for AI agent clarity.

data.current_description: Returns all currently tracked aircraft of a specific ICAO type designator.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all currently tracked aircraft matching a specific ICAO type designator (e.g., B737, A380). Returns a collection of aircraft objects with real-time position, altitude, speed, and identification data for all aircraft of the specified type worldwide.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on what constitutes a type designator format and what specific aircraft data is returned. Enhanced description provides example format and specifies return data structure for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'getMilitaryAircraft' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks detail on what constitutes 'military' classification and what data fields are returned. Enhanced description clarifies military identification methodology and specifies return data structure for AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Returns all currently tracked military aircraft worldwide.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves all currently tracked military aircraft from the global ADS-B receiver network. Returns a collection of aircraft objects containing real-time position, altitude, speed, and identification data. Military aircraft identification is based on ICAO address ranges and operator databases.
data.reasoning: Description lacks detail on what constitutes 'military' classification and what data fields are returned. Enhanced description clarifies military identification methodology and specifies return data structure for AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getLaddAircraft' has semantic quality issues: missing_context, missing_output_details, poor_ai_interpretability. Original summary uses unexplained acronym 'LADD' without context. Description lacks explanation of what LADD is and how it affects returned data. Enhanced summary expands acronym and description explains the program's purpose and data limitations for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Returns aircraft subject to FAA Limiting Aircraft Data Displayed program.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve aircraft subject to FAA LADD restrictions
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aircraft currently subject to the FAA's Limiting Aircraft Data Displayed (LADD) program, which restricts tracking of certain aircraft for security and privacy reasons. Returns a collection of aircraft objects with available position and identification data. LADD-restricted aircraft may have limited or redacted information compared to unrestricted aircraft.
data.reasoning: Original summary uses unexplained acronym 'LADD' without context. Description lacks explanation of what LADD is and how it affects returned data. Enhanced summary expands acronym and description explains the program's purpose and data limitations for better AI agent interpretability.
